Name: HipChat - Notify
Description: Notifies a HipChat room of a deployment outcome.

Parameters.Name: AuthToken
Parameters.Label: API Auth Token
Parameters.HelpText: HipChat authentication token for a user who can post notifications to rooms

Parameters.Name: RoomId
Parameters.Label: Room
Parameters.HelpText: The room name that you wish to post a notification to

Parameters.Name: NotificationText
Parameters.Label: Notification Text
Parameters.HelpText: An optional text override for the notification. Default is: <(succeeded) or (failed)> (Project) v(Release) deployed to (Environment) on (Machine)

Parameters.Name: NotificationColor
Parameters.Label: Notification Color
Parameters.HelpText: The color for the notification for the room. Default messages will receive green success, and red failure.
